name: io.github.quantakrypto/pqc-tools
title: quantakrypto pqc-tools
description: Post-quantum readiness tools for AI coding agents. Scan code for quantum-vulnerable cryptography (RSA/ECDH/ECDSA/DH), get NIST ML-KEM/ML-DSA/SLH-DSA migration guidance, verify fixes, and check dependencies. Content-based, advisory tools only.
